name: python3-software-properties
title: python3-software-properties
summary: manage the repositories that you install software from
description:
manage the repositories that you install software from
This software provides an abstraction of the used apt repositories.
It allows you to easily manage your distribution and independent software
vendor software sources.
.
This package contains the Python3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-software-properties because manage the repositories that you install software from.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-software-properties as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-software-properties with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-software-properties --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
